subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-08
subcodes.first_line: I am always thinking how to carry the loads of others and not to put my own load on their shoulders. The Blessed Perfection has taught me this. We must prove this through deed and not by mere word.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @words vs deeds
